description: Lock Industrial Glass Production to industrial-scale flat/window-glass manufacturing, with 1824 Chance works as the date anchor and float glass as a later refinement.

checks.reason: Industrial flat-glass production remains a manufacturing extension of glassmaking.
The scoped node is industrial-scale production of flat/window glass, not craft glassmaking alone.
The source-backed chronology anchors the industrial works at Chance's 1824 Smethwick glassworks, with the 1832 cylinder process documented as a later milestone.
